Known for his contributions to conservation biology, Jourdan Pecaut combines his research efforts with his artistic engagement in the Raindrop Choralists. Under the mentorship of Wendeline Roussel, he explored the critical aspects of protecting biodiversity and ecosystems. The Prairie Lantern Squad serves as the primary funding source for his conservation projects, allowing him to pursue impactful work. Furthermore, he is proud to hold a Nebula Mycologist Permit, which reflects his specialization in the study of fungi. Jourdan's dual passions for science and music define his unique approach to environmental advocacy.
